FlowAI.pageSubtitle: Ask AI for data, reports, or business statistics.
FlowAI.no_debt: Great news! 🎉 Currently, you have no uncollected debts in the system. All clients have paid in full!
FlowAI.has_debt:
It looks like we have some pending payments. 💰

In total, {count} clients owe you **{total} {currency}**.

Here are the main debts:{details}

Click the button below to see all details and record their payments.
FlowAI.free_day: Good news! 🎉 On **{date}** you have no events scheduled. The venues are free. Would you like to add a new booking for this date?
FlowAI.busy_day: On **{date}** you have a busy day with {count} scheduled events: 📅
FlowAI.revenue:
Great job! 📈

This month you have collected a total of **{amount} {currency}** from {count} completed events.

To see how this profit is distributed across venues and dates, check the full financial report:
FlowAI.limit_reached:
It looks like you've reached your current package limit. 🛑
To avoid blocking new data entry, I suggest upgrading to a larger package. It only takes 1 minute!
FlowAI.add_booking_guide:
To add a booking:
1. Go to 'Bookings' in the left menu.
2. Click the 'Add Booking' button.
3. Fill in the date, venue, and select the menu.
4. Save the booking.
FlowAI.add_offer_guide:
Quotations are created as follows:
1. Go to 'Quotations' from the main menu.
2. Click the 'Add Quotation' button.
3. Fill in client details and prices.
4. You can send it via Email or print it!
FlowAI.fallback:
Sorry, I didn't quite understand that. 🤔
I'm still being trained! You can ask me things like:
- Do we have events today?
- Who hasn't paid yet?
- I want to add a booking.
FlowAI.pending_requests: You have {count} new requests from reception waiting for your approval. 🔔
FlowAI.no_pending: You have no new pending requests at the moment. Everything is clear! ✅
FlowAI.date_query_fallback: To check the calendar, please enter a specific date (e.g., 'What do we have on May 15?'). 📅
FlowAI.add_user_guide:
To add new staff to the system:
1. Go to 'Settings' > 'Users'.
2. Click 'Add Staff'.
3. Assign email, role (Manager/Reception), and a password.
FlowAI.add_menu_guide:
To change menus or prices:
1. Go to 'Settings' > 'Menus'.
2. Here you can modify existing prices or create a new food package.
FlowAI.client_found:
Yes, I found data! 🎉
Client **{name}** has an active booking on **{date}** in venue **{hall}**. 📅
FlowAI.client_not_found:
Sorry, I couldn't find any active booking under the name '{name}'. 🧐
Make sure you're typing the name correctly or try searching in the Clients section.
FlowAI.multiple_clients: I found {count} different bookings under the name '{name}'. Which one would you like to see?
FlowAI.abonim_guide:
To manage your subscription or change package:
1. Click on your business name top right.
2. Select 'My Subscription'.
3. Here you can choose a new package and see billing details.

Click the button to go directly there: 🚀

LegalPages.termsIntro: Welcome to HALLEVO, managed by ADX POSITIVE SH.P.K. By using our platform, you agree to the following terms.
LegalPages.termsSection1Desc: We provide a SaaS (Software as a Service) platform for event management. You receive a limited, non-exclusive license to use this software for business purposes according to your subscription plan.
LegalPages.termsSection2Desc: Our payment processing (credit/debit cards) is managed by Paddle.com. Paddle is the 'Merchant of Record' (MoR) for all our orders. This means Paddle handles billing, tax collection, and payment data security. All billing inquiries can be directed to us or Paddle.
LegalPages.termsSection3Desc: You can cancel your subscription at any time from your control panel. After cancellation, you will have access until the end of your paid period. We reserve the right to block accounts that violate the law or abuse the system.
LegalPages.privacyIntro: Your privacy is important to ADX POSITIVE SH.P.K. This policy explains how we collect and use your data.
LegalPages.privacySection1Desc: We collect basic account info (name, email, business ID) and data you voluntarily enter (bookings, your clients). We NEVER sell your data to third parties.
LegalPages.privacySection2Desc: We do not store any credit card data. All payments are securely processed through our partner Paddle.com. Please refer to Paddle's Privacy Policy for details on payment data storage.
LegalPages.privacySection3Desc: Your data is stored on secure servers and we use industry-standard encryption to protect communication between your browser and our platform.
LegalPages.refundIntro: This policy explains our rules regarding refunds for HALLEVO subscriptions.
LegalPages.refundSection1Desc: If you are not satisfied with our service, we offer a full refund within the first 14 days of your initial purchase. This applies only to the first transaction and not to subsequent monthly or annual renewals.
LegalPages.refundSection2Desc: To request a refund within the 14-day period, please email our customer support. Since Paddle processes our payments, the refund will be returned directly to the card you used within 3-5 business days.
LegalPages.refundSection3Desc: If you cancel your subscription after the first 14 days, you will not be charged for the next month, but there will be no partial refund for the unused time of the current month (or year).

Signatures.title: Signatures and Seals (For Contracts)
Signatures.subtitle: Upload your seal and draw your signature. These will automatically appear at the bottom of every contract and invoice.

Landing.heroDesc: The all-in-one SaaS platform for event halls, restaurants, and wedding venues. Manage bookings, staff, menus, and payments from a single dashboard.
Landing.aiTitle: Meet HALLEVO AI, your virtual receptionist.
Landing.aiDesc: Automate client inquiries, send instant pro-forma invoices, and book events without lifting a finger.
Landing.aiStep1Desc: AI replies to client messages regarding availability instantly.
Landing.aiStep2Desc: Cross-checks your calendar to prevent double bookings.
Landing.aiStep3Desc: Generates and sends custom quotes automatically.
Landing.featuresSubtitle: Powerful modules designed specifically for the hospitality industry.
Landing.feat1Desc: A visual calendar to track weddings, corporate events, and parties.
Landing.feat2Desc: Track your deposits, pending payments, and overall revenue.
Landing.feat3Desc: Create custom menus for different events and track stock.
Landing.feat4Desc: Assign roles, track hours, and manage your team efficiently.
Landing.testiTitle: Trusted by top venues across the region.
Landing.testi1Text: HALLEVO completely changed how we handle weddings. No more double bookings or lost deposit receipts.
Landing.testi2Text: The AI assistant alone saves me 3 hours of messaging every single day. Highly recommended!
Landing.testi3Text: Finally, a software that understands how Albanian restaurants and event halls actually work.
Landing.pricingSubtitle: Choose the plan that fits your venue's size. Cancel anytime.
Landing.contactDesc: Our team is here to help you set up your venue.
Landing.cookieText: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, serve personalized ads or content, and analyze our traffic.
Landing.aiChatUser: Hello! Do you have the main hall available on August 15th for 250 people?
Landing.aiChatStatus: HALL AI is checking the calendar...
Landing.aiChatReply: Hello! 👋 Yes, the Diamond Hall is available on August 15th. For 250 people, our Standard Menu starts at €45/person. Would you like me to send a pro-forma invoice via WhatsApp?

refund.title: Cancellation and Refund Policy
refund.intro: At HALLEVO, we want you to be 100% satisfied with our platform. Below are our cancellation and refund terms for our SaaS subscriptions.
refund.sec1Desc: Every new account receives a 14-day free trial with access to all modules, without requiring a credit card upfront. If you decide during this time that the platform is not for you, simply do not upgrade to a paid subscription. You will not be charged.
refund.sec2Desc: You can cancel your subscription at any time from your dashboard (My Profile ➔ My Subscription ➔ Cancel Subscription). Once canceled, you will no longer be charged in the next billing cycle. Your account will remain active until the end of the period you have paid for.
refund.sec3Desc: Due to the digital nature of the service, our general rule is:
refund.monthly: Monthly Payments: No refunds are offered for the monthly fee of the billing cycle in which you are currently operating.
refund.yearly: Yearly Payments: If you have paid for a full year and change your mind within the first 7 days of payment, you can contact us for a full or partial refund (minus the days used). After 7 days have passed from the annual subscription, refunds are no longer possible.
refund.sec4Desc: Refunds may be issued at the company's discretion if there were billing errors by our system or if the service was completely offline (downtime) for more than 72 consecutive hours. Every request is reviewed within 2-3 business days.
refund.contact: To request a refund under these conditions, please write to us at:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how HALLEVO ("we", "our") collects, uses, and shares your personal information when you use our website and SaaS platform.
privacy.sec1Desc1: Account Data: When you register, we collect your name, email, business name, and password.
privacy.sec1Desc2: Your Clients' Data: The data you enter into the system (your clients' names, phone numbers for events). We do not have direct access to them and do not share them with any third parties.
privacy.sec1Desc3: Payment Data: Billing details are managed directly by our payment processors (Paddle/Stripe). We do not store credit card numbers.
privacy.sec2Title: 2. How do we use your data?
privacy.sec2Desc: We use the collected data for the following purposes:
privacy.sec2Bullet1: To ensure the operation and maintenance of the platform.
privacy.sec2Bullet2: To manage your account and subscription.
privacy.sec2Bullet3: To send you administrative notifications (e.g., invoices, password reset).
privacy.sec2Bullet4: To protect the system from abuse and cyber attacks.
privacy.sec3Desc: We never sell your personal data. We may only share them with essential services that make the platform's operation possible:
privacy.sec3Bullet1: Payment providers: (Stripe, Paddle) to process subscriptions.
privacy.sec3Bullet2: Server/Cloud providers: (e.g., AWS, Vercel, Supabase) for the secure storage of the database.
privacy.sec4Desc: If you are a resident in Europe, you have the right to request access, correction, or total deletion of your personal data from our servers. To request this, use our contact email.
privacy.contact: If you have questions about this policy, contact us at:

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.sec1Desc: Cookies are small text files stored on your device (computer or mobile) when you visit our site. They help us recognize your device, improve your browsing experience, and analyze how the platform is used.
cookies.sec2Bullet1: Strictly Necessary Cookies: Essential for the operation of the system. Without them, you cannot log into your account or use the platform.
cookies.sec2Bullet2: Performance and Analytics Cookies: Tell us which parts of the platform are visited most often, helping us make it faster and easier for you.
cookies.sec3Desc: Yes, through our Cookie banner you have the option to choose "Reject All". However, cookies essential for the operation of the program will remain active, otherwise, the platform cannot provide you with the service.
